feature.name: Shelter of the Faithful
feature.description: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at any temple of your faith.

feature.name: Criminal Contact
feature.description: You have a reliable contact who acts as a liaison to the criminal underworld.

feature.name: Rustic Hospitality
feature.description: Common folk will hide you and provide for your needs in their homes.

feature.name: Position of Privilege
feature.description: Welcomed in high society; people will go to great lengths to accommodate you.

feature.name: Researcher
feature.description: When you don't know information, you can often find where to obtain it (libraries, sages, contacts).

soldier.name: Soldier
equipment: set of bone dice or deck of cards

feature.name: Military Rank
feature.description: Soldiers loyal to your former organization recognize your authority.

outlander.name: Outlander
equipment: trophy from an animal you killed

feature.name: Wanderer
feature.description: Excellent memory for maps and geography. You can find food and fresh water for yourself and up to five others.

feature.name: Discovery
feature.description: Your seclusion gave you access to a unique and powerful discovery.
